items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where the persona views corporate vs local reporting split. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this specific scenario has been executed or that the expected results have been captured. The linked use cases and prior steps do not demonstrate any outcomes related to the reporting split, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
